text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Tehran rejects any attempt to separate Israel from the US. — A source told Fars News Agency that despite progress in Pakistan-mediated talks, Iran warns against a recurring narrative that blames Israel while absolving Washington. — The source said some parties portray Israel as an independent disruptor to let the US evade responsibility. — Iran firmly rejects this distinction, holding Washington accountable for any breakdown in negotiations. — Consultations are ongoing with mediation by Pakistan.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 德黑兰拒绝任何将以色列与美国分开的企图。——一位消息人士告诉法尔斯通讯社，尽管在巴基斯坦斡旋的会谈中取得了进展，但伊朗警告称，不要再出现那种指责以色列而免除华盛顿责任的叙事。——该消息人士称，一些势力将以色列描绘成一个独立的破坏者，以让美国逃避责任。——伊朗坚决拒绝这种区分，并让华盛顿对谈判的任何破裂负责。——在巴基斯坦的斡旋下，磋商正在进行中。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 Fars News Agency: An informed Iranian source warned that Tehran rejects any attempt to separate Israel from the United States by portraying Israel as a rogue actor while exonerating Washington. The source said that while diplomatic efforts continue…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 A photo has been released of the Iranian negotiation team in Islamabad. The delegation includes foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baqaei, parliamentary speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi, deputy foreign minister Kazem Gharibabadi, and more. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 法尔斯通讯社：一位伊朗知情人士警告称，德黑兰拒绝任何将以色列与美国分开的企图，即通过将以色列描绘成流氓行为者而为华盛顿开脱。该消息人士称，尽管外交努力仍在继续……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗谈判代表团在伊斯兰堡的照片已发布。代表团成员包括外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖里（Esmaeil Baqaei）、议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）、外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐（Abbas Araghchi）、副外交部长卡泽姆·加里巴巴迪（Kazem Gharibabadi）等。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ Meeting of the Iranian negotiating team in Islamabad
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ 伊朗谈判代表团在伊斯兰堡会面

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸 Al Jazeera: A Pakistani diplomatic source said intensive efforts are under way to arrange direct negotiations between the Iranian and American delegations in Islamabad. If no direct talks take place, the discussions will be indirect and will last…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Fars News Agency: An informed Iranian source warned that Tehran rejects any attempt to separate Israel from the United States by portraying Israel as a rogue actor while exonerating Washington. The source said that while diplomatic efforts continue, some are trying to blame Israel for sabotage, but Iran holds the U.S. fully responsible for the outcome of the talks and does not recognise Israel as an independent player disconnected from American decisions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸 半岛电视台：一位巴基斯坦外交消息人士称，目前正在进行密集努力，以安排伊朗和美国代表团在伊斯兰堡进行直接谈判。如果没有直接会谈，讨论将是间接的，并将持续……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 法尔斯通讯社：一位伊朗知情人士警告称，德黑兰拒绝任何将以色列与美国分开的企图，即通过将以色列描绘成流氓行为者而为华盛顿开脱。该消息人士称，尽管外交努力仍在继续，但有些人试图将破坏行为归咎于以色列，但伊朗认为美国对会谈结果负有全部责任，并且不承认以色列是一个与美国决策脱钩的独立参与者。 @wfwitness

text: Nuno Felix One thing is definitely true, if the system holds well in the Netherlands it will work perfectly everywhere else in Europe. I know the Netherlands well and have drove extensively in the country and, despite its excellent infrastructure , it’s difficult . RDW was extremely rigorous in their review - Elon Musk tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 有一件事是肯定的，如果该系统在荷兰运行良好，它在欧洲其他任何地方都能完美运行。我很了解荷兰，并在该国广泛驾驶过，尽管其基础设施非常出色，但它（驾驶）很困难。RDW（荷兰车辆管理局）在审查中极其严格 - 埃隆·马斯克推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz Are the previous limitations still in place? The funds were meant to be used solely for humanitarian purposes. This dates back to before October 7, 2023 BREAKING: Senior Iranian official tells Reuters the U.S. has agreed to release Iranian assets frozen in Qatar and other foreign banks, with Tehran calling it a sign of goodwill toward a durable peace deal and linking the move to guarantees of safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz - Faytuks Network tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 之前的限制仍然有效吗？这些资金本应仅用于人道主义目的。这可以追溯到2023年10月7日之前。突发：伊朗高级官员告诉路透社，美国已同意解冻伊朗在卡塔尔和其他外国银行的资产，德黑兰称这是迈向持久和平协议的善意姿态，并将此举与确保霍尔木兹海峡安全通行的保证联系起来 - Faytuks Network推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: The US has agreed to 'release Iranian frozen assets held in Qatar and other foreign banks' and this is 'directly linked to ensuring safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz', according to Reuters report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 突发：据路透社报道，美国已同意“解冻伊朗在卡塔尔和其他外国银行持有的资产”，这“直接与确保霍尔木兹海峡的安全通行挂钩”。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @USAmbIndia : Always great to see my friend and Secretary of the Army Dan Driscoll @SecArmy where we discussed the momentum in the U.S.-India relationship following his January visit. The U.S. Army and Indian Army will play an important role in bolstering defense ties. https://twitter.com/USAmbIndia/status/2042709099121381678/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @USAmbIndia：很高兴见到我的朋友、陆军部长丹·德里斯科尔（Dan Driscoll）@SecArmy，我们讨论了继他一月份访问后美印关系的势头。美国陆军和印度陆军将在加强防务关系方面发挥重要作用。https://twitter.com/USAmbIndia/status/2042709099121381678/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Zelensky says Ukraine will stick to an Easter ceasefire and mirror any violations. No Russian strikes in the air, on land or at sea means no response, and Ukraine has told Russia the truce could continue after Easter. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042899705047245109/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 泽连斯基表示，乌克兰将坚持复活节停火，并对任何违规行为进行对等回应。空中、陆地或海上没有俄罗斯的袭击就意味着没有回应，乌克兰已告知俄罗斯，停火可能会在复活节后继续。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042899705047245109/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 According to Reuters, an Iranian official said the United States has agreed to release frozen Iranian assets held in Qatar and other foreign banks. 🔹 Tehran views the move as a gesture of goodwill toward a long-term peace agreement and links it to guarantees for safe navigation in the Strait of Hormuz. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 据路透社报道，一位伊朗官员表示，美国已同意解冻伊朗在卡塔尔和其他外国银行持有的资产。🔹 德黑兰将此举视为迈向长期和平协议的善意姿态，并将其与霍尔木兹海峡的安全航行保证联系起来。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: The face of Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei was 'disfigured' in the attack that killed his father, and he is currently 'still recovering from severe facial and leg injuries', according to Reuters report. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2042898166832636385/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 突发：据路透社报道，伊朗新任最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（Mojtaba Khamenei）在杀害其父亲的袭击中“毁容”，目前“仍在从严重的面部和腿部伤势中恢复”。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2042898166832636385/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 Ukrainian company Carmine Sky has deployed towers equipped with remotely operated Sky Sentinel turrets as part of a private air defense system. ▪️ The automated turrets, based on the M2 Browning machine gun, are controlled via a gamepad, with targeting supported by camera feeds and machine vision technology. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇦 乌克兰公司 Carmine Sky 部署了配备远程操作 Sky Sentinel 炮塔的塔楼，作为私人防空系统的一部分。▪️ 这些基于 M2 勃朗宁机枪的自动化炮塔通过游戏手柄控制，瞄准由摄像头馈送和机器视觉技术支持。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 Zelensky: 📌 “Today, we defined our response parameters to potential ceasefire violations by Russian forces. We understand who we are dealing with.” 📌 “Ukraine will observe silence and respond strictly in a mirror manner — if there are no Russian strikes in the air, on land, or at sea, there will be no response from us.” 📌 “The Ukrainian army is prepared for any scenario. We have repeatedly proposed various ceasefire formats and believe Easter should be a time of calm and security.” 📌 “An Easter ceasefire could mark the beginning of real progress toward peace — we have made such a proposal.” 📌 “We also coordinated with the Commander-in-Chief on how Ukrainian units will operate under ceasefire conditions and informed the Russian side about the mirror-response approach and the possibility of extending the ceasefire beyond Easter.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇦 泽连斯基：📌 “今天，我们确定了对俄罗斯军队潜在停火违规行为的应对参数。我们了解我们在与谁打交道。” 📌 “乌克兰将保持沉默并严格进行对等回应——如果空中、陆地或海上没有俄罗斯的袭击，我们将不会有任何回应。” 📌 “乌克兰军队已为任何情况做好准备。我们多次提出各种停火形式，并认为复活节应该是一个平静和安全的时刻。” 📌 “复活节停火可能标志着迈向和平的真正进展的开始——我们已经提出了这样的建议。” 📌 “我们还与总司令协调了乌克兰部队在停火条件下的行动方式，并告知俄方对等回应的方法以及在复活节后延长停火的可能性。” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @general_ben : Your map is a mess and your analysis is worse. Rota is a Spanish Naval base which hosts US Navy ships responsible for Missile Defense of the Mediterranean region, including Israel. At the 'gateway to the Mediterranean'...kinda important for protecting freedom of navigation in and out of the Med. Keep the bases in Germany. Berlin has its problems, but it’s an important ally and now meets NATO’s 2% target. Spain lags, resists higher defense spending, and under Sánchez acts like an American adversary while relying on America’s shield. - Mark Dubowitz tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @general_ben：你的地图一团糟，你的分析更糟。罗塔（Rota）是一个西班牙海军基地，驻扎着负责地中海地区导弹防御（包括以色列）的美国海军舰艇。在“地中海门户”……对于保护地中海内外的航行自由来说相当重要。把基地留在德国吧。柏林有它的问题，但它是一个重要的盟友，现在达到了北约2%的目标。西班牙落后，抵制增加国防开支，在桑切斯（Sánchez）领导下表现得像美国的对手，同时又依赖美国的保护伞。 - 马克·杜博维茨（Mark Dubowitz）推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 Al-Alam: The Iranian delegation met again with Pakistan’s army chief before their scheduled meeting with Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, with the possibility of a new message being exchanged. A Pakistani diplomatic source said intensive…" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Al Jazeera: A Pakistani diplomatic source said intensive efforts are under way to arrange direct negotiations between the Iranian and American delegations in Islamabad. If no direct talks take place, the discussions will be indirect and will last only one day. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 灯塔电视台（Al-Alam）：伊朗代表团在与巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫（Shehbaz Sharif）预定会面之前，再次与巴基斯坦陆军参谋长会面，可能会交换新的信息。一位巴基斯坦外交消息人士称，密集……” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 半岛电视台：一位巴基斯坦外交消息人士称，目前正在进行密集努力，以安排伊朗和美国代表团在伊斯兰堡进行直接谈判。如果没有直接会谈，讨论将是间接的，并且只会持续一天。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇱 Tasnim News Agency: Iranian officials are holding intensive consultations with Pakistani authorities to compel the United States to fulfil its commitments ahead of possible talks. Progress has been made, but Israel and Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Al-Alam: The Iranian delegation met again with Pakistan’s army chief before their scheduled meeting with Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, with the possibility of a new message being exchanged. A Pakistani diplomatic source said intensive efforts are under way for direct talks between the U.S. and Iranian delegations; if not, talks will be indirect and last one day. Iranian state media confirmed that no other countries besides the two negotiating parties and the mediator are present or authorised. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇱 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗官员正在与巴基斯坦当局进行密集磋商，以迫使美国在可能进行的会谈前履行其承诺。已取得进展，但以色列和以色列总理内塔尼亚胡……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 灯塔电视台：伊朗代表团在与巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫预定会面之前，再次与巴基斯坦陆军参谋长会面，可能会交换新的信息。一位巴基斯坦外交消息人士称，目前正在进行密集努力，以安排美伊代表团进行直接谈判；如果不行，会谈将是间接的，并持续一天。伊朗官方媒体证实，除了两个谈判方和调解人外，没有其他国家在场或获得授权。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸 The United States has agreed to release frozen Iranian assets. Tehran views the release of its assets as a test of goodwill and a new indication toward reaching a lasting agreement. No further details have been released about the amount of assets freed…" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 However, Reuters noted that while Iran welcomed the development, the United States has not yet publicly commented on the issue of unfreezing assets.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸 美国已同意解冻伊朗资产。德黑兰将资产解冻视为善意的考验，也是迈向达成持久协议的新迹象。关于解冻资产的金额，尚未发布进一步细节……” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 然而，路透社指出，尽管伊朗对这一进展表示欢迎，但美国尚未就解冻资产问题发表公开评论。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇶🇦🇮🇷 Qatar gas released for the first time footage of the wreckage of at least one Iranian Su-24. A pair of Su-24 was allegedly shot down by Qarari fighter jets as they were about to bomb the Al-Udeid airbase. The video shows parts of the fuselage, landing…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇶🇦 Al Jazeera also released close up footage showing extensive damage to the Al Udeid Base in Qatar, which sustained damage due to Iranian attacks: "Here at Al Udeid Air Base located southwest of Doha, the Qatari forces allowed us to enter the base and photograph there for a short time due to the complex security conditions. During the days of the war, the base was exposed more than once to Iranian attacks with missiles and drones. This is one of the sites inside the base that was targeted by a ballistic missile that caused great destruction in it." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇶🇦🇮🇷 卡塔尔天然气公司首次发布了至少一架伊朗苏-24残骸的画面。据称，一对苏-24在准备轰炸乌代德空军基地时被卡塔尔战斗机击落。视频显示了机身、起落架的部分……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇶🇦 半岛电视台还发布了特写镜头，显示卡塔尔乌代德基地遭受了严重破坏，该基地因伊朗的袭击而受损：“在位于多哈西南部的乌代德空军基地，由于复杂的安全状况，卡塔尔军队允许我们进入基地并进行短时间拍摄。在战争期间，该基地不止一次遭到伊朗导弹和无人机的袭击。这是基地内被弹道导弹击中的地点之一，造成了巨大的破坏。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Reuters: The United States has reportedly agreed to release the assets of Iranian leaders in exchange for Tehran guaranteeing the safety of shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Tasnim News Agency: Iranian officials are holding intensive consultations with Pakistani authorities to compel the United States to fulfil its commitments ahead of possible talks. Progress has been made, but Israel and Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu are continuing to sabotage efforts to prevent a deal. Iran holds the U.S. responsible and considers Israel its partner, continuing to demand accountability from Washington. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 路透社：据报道，美国已同意解冻伊朗领导人的资产，以换取德黑兰保证霍尔木兹海峡的航运安全。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗官员正在与巴基斯坦当局进行密集磋商，以迫使美国在可能进行的会谈前履行其承诺。已取得进展，但以色列和以色列总理内塔尼亚胡继续破坏努力以阻止协议达成。伊朗认为美国负有责任，并将以色列视为其伙伴，继续要求华盛顿承担责任。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 The United States has agreed to release frozen Iranian assets. Tehran views the release of its assets as a test of goodwill and a new indication toward reaching a lasting agreement. No further details have been released about the amount of assets freed or the timing of this decision.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国已同意解冻伊朗资产。德黑兰将资产解冻视为善意的考验，也是迈向达成持久协议的新迹象。关于解冻资产的金额或这一决定的时间，尚未发布进一步细节。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Footage of the negotiation venue where the U.S.-Iran talks will are set to take place. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Reuters: The United States has reportedly agreed to release the assets of Iranian leaders in exchange for Tehran guaranteeing the safety of shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 美伊会谈预定举行的谈判地点画面。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 路透社：据报道，美国已同意解冻伊朗领导人的资产，以换取德黑兰保证霍尔木兹海峡的航运安全。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from DD Geopolitics: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Update from Professor Marandi, who is part of the delegation in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 DD Geopolitics：🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 来自伊斯兰堡代表团成员马兰迪（Marandi）教授的最新消息。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷🇵🇰 The Iranian delegation, headed by Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf and attended by Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi, met and held discussions with Pakistan’s Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Update from Professor Marandi, who is part of the delegation in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷🇵🇰 由穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫率领、伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐出席的伊朗代表团在伊斯兰堡会见了巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫并进行了讨论。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 来自伊斯兰堡代表团成员马兰迪教授的最新消息。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Iran raises the issue of U.S. breaches of commitments with Pakistan’s Prime Minister Tasnim’s correspondent in Islamabad, Pakistan: ➡️The Iranian delegation will raise the issue of the American side’s breaches of commitments in today’s noon meeting with…" 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 The Iranian delegation, headed by Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf and attended by Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi, met and held discussions with Pakistan’s Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 伊朗向巴基斯坦总理提出美国违背承诺的问题。塔斯尼姆通讯社驻巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡记者：➡️伊朗代表团将在今天中午的会议上提出美方违背承诺的问题……” 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 由穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫率领、伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐出席的伊朗代表团在伊斯兰堡会见了巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫并进行了讨论。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: BREAKING: The United States has agreed to release frozen Iranian assets. Tehran views the release of its assets as a test of goodwill and a new indication toward reaching a lasting agreement. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 突发：美国已同意解冻伊朗资产。德黑兰将资产解冻视为善意的考验，也是迈向达成持久协议的新迹象。来源：路透社

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 U.S. Vice President J.D. Vance, Special Envoy to the Middle East Steve Witkoff, and White House official Jared Kushner have arrived in Pakistan to take part in negotiations on a U.S.-Iran ceasefire set to be held in Islamabad. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2042893278807282125/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 美国副总统万斯（J.D. Vance）、中东特使史蒂夫·威特科夫（Steve Witkoff）和白宫官员贾里德·库什纳（Jared Kushner）已抵达巴基斯坦，参加定于伊斯兰堡举行的美伊停火谈判。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2042893278807282125/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @LIGHTNING5T : 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 In the Dnipropetrovsk region, the Armed Forces of Ukraine advanced in Novopavlivka. https://twitter.com/LIGHTNING5T/status/2042891626339532887/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @LIGHTNING5T：🇷🇺 🇺🇦 在第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克地区，乌克兰武装部队在诺沃帕夫利夫卡（Novopavlivka）取得了进展。https://twitter.com/LIGHTNING5T/status/2042891626339532887/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 The Iranian news agency Tasnim: Iran will start talks with the U.S. only after discussing with Pakistan the violation of the ceasefire terms by the Americans, primarily the release of frozen Iranian assets and a ceasefire in Lebanon. The Iranian delegation, headed by Kalibaf and Araqchi, will discuss the alleged violations in Lebanon in the expected meeting today with Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, and according to the report, only after that will a decision be made regarding negotiations with the U.S. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗只有在与巴基斯坦讨论美国违反停火条款（主要是解冻伊朗资产和黎巴嫩停火）后，才会开始与美国进行会谈。由卡利巴夫和阿拉格齐率领的伊朗代表团将在今天与巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫的预期会晤中讨论所谓的黎巴嫩违规行为，据报道，只有在那之后，才会就与美国的谈判做出决定。推文

text: WarTranslated Footage shows Russian occupiers being destroyed during a landing. 4 killed and 14 wounded. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042891529556017318/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 画面显示俄罗斯占领者在登陆时被摧毁。4人死亡，14人受伤。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042891529556017318/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Photos of the Artemis II crew, NASA astronaut Reid Wiseman, Artemis II commander, NASA astronaut Victor Glover, Artemis II pilot, NASA astronaut Christina Koch, Artemis II mission specialist, and Canadian Space Agency (CSA) astronaut Jeremy Hansen, Artemis II mission specialist following their successful splashdown and recovery in the Pacific Ocean yesterday. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 阿尔忒弥斯2号（Artemis II）机组人员的照片：阿尔忒弥斯2号指挥官、NASA宇航员里德·怀斯曼（Reid Wiseman）；阿尔忒弥斯2号飞行员、NASA宇航员维克多·格洛弗（Victor Glover）；阿尔忒弥斯2号任务专家、NASA宇航员克里斯蒂娜·科赫（Christina Koch）；以及阿尔忒弥斯2号任务专家、加拿大航天局（CSA）宇航员杰里米·汉森（Jeremy Hansen），他们在昨天成功溅落并被太平洋回收后。推文

text: WarTranslated Lavrov claims the conflict with Ukraine cannot be settled without security guarantees for Russia. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 拉夫罗夫声称，如果没有俄罗斯的安全保障，与乌克兰的冲突就无法解决。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Fars News Agency: Iranian judicial authorities have seized the accounts and assets of dozens of individuals accused of treason. The list includes Ali Sharifi Zarchi, Ali Karimi, Hamed Esmaeilion, Ashkan Khatibi, Mohammad Sadeghi, Maziar Fallahi, Parastoo Salehi, Zahra Ghanbari, Masoud Shojaei, Pouria Zeraati, Fardad Farahzad, Elnaz Kiani, Ahmad Samadi, Mojtaba Pourmohsen, Niousha Saremi, and many others. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 法尔斯通讯社：伊朗司法当局已查封了数十名被控叛国罪的人员的账户和资产。名单包括阿里·沙里菲·扎尔奇（Ali Sharifi Zarchi）、阿里·卡里米（Ali Karimi）、哈米德·埃斯梅利翁（Hamed Esmaeilion）、阿什坎·哈蒂比（Ashkan Khatibi）、穆罕默德·萨德吉（Mohammad Sadeghi）、马齐亚尔·法拉希（Maziar Fallahi）、帕拉斯图·萨利希（Parastoo Salehi）、扎赫拉·甘巴里（Zahra Ghanbari）、马苏德·肖贾伊（Masoud Shojaei）、普里亚·泽拉蒂（Pouria Zeraati）、法尔达德·法拉赫扎德（Fardad Farahzad）、埃尔纳兹·基亚尼（Elnaz Kiani）、艾哈迈德·萨马迪（Ahmad Samadi）、莫杰塔巴·普尔莫森（Mojtaba Pourmohsen）、尼乌莎·萨雷米（Niousha Saremi）等许多人。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 The commander of the Pakistan Army Asim Munir met with Iranian and American delegations - wearing very different outfits. A subtle signal - or not subtle at all?
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔（Asim Munir）会见了伊朗和美国代表团——穿着截然不同的服装。一个微妙的信号——还是根本不微妙？

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 The Syrian interior ministry has thwarted a sabotage plot in Damascus by arresting a five‑member cell linked to an external party. Authorities also defused an explosive device in the capital that was intended to target a religious figure. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 叙利亚内政部通过逮捕一个与外部势力有关联的五人小组，挫败了大马士革的一起破坏阴谋。当局还在首都拆除了一枚旨在针对宗教人士的爆炸装置。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰🇱🇧 Iranian media said a “good cop, bad cop” scenario is playing out ahead of possible US‑Iran talks in Islamabad, with U.S. President Trump issuing threats while U.S. Vice President Vance is portrayed as a peacemaker. Iran maintains two preconditions…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Footage of the negotiation venue where the U.S.-Iran talks will are set to take place. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰🇱🇧 伊朗媒体称，在伊斯兰堡可能举行的美伊会谈前，正在上演一场“好警察、坏警察”的戏码，美国总统特朗普发出威胁，而美国副总统万斯则被描绘成和平缔造者。伊朗坚持两个先决条件……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 美伊会谈预定举行的谈判地点画面。 @wfwitness

text: Melania Trump's Surprise Move Reopens Epstein Debate, Baffles White House Melania Trump denied Epstein links & called for hearings on a suddent press release, creating confusion inside the White House & reviving scrutiny of the case as officials & lawmakers react to her unexpected intervention. READ MORE
text_zh: 梅拉尼娅·特朗普（Melania Trump）的惊人举动重新引发了爱泼斯坦（Epstein）辩论，让白宫感到困惑。梅拉尼娅·特朗普否认与爱泼斯坦有联系，并在一份突发新闻稿中呼吁举行听证会，这在白宫内部造成了混乱，并随着官员和立法者对她意想不到的干预做出反应，重新引发了对该案件的审查。阅读更多

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇨🇳 🇷🇺 🇸🇦 🇶🇦 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Tasnim's correspondent dispatched to Islamabad, Pakistan: Following the news about the invitation of 4 countries China, Russia, Saudi Arabia, and Qatar to the Islamabad talks, a knowledgeable source told Tasnim's correspondent in Pakistan that this news is not true and has not been confirmed. The Iranian and American teams are the only countries present in Islamabad.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇨🇳 🇷🇺 🇸🇦 🇶🇦 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 塔斯尼姆通讯社派驻巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡的记者：继关于邀请中国、俄罗斯、沙特阿拉伯和卡塔尔4国参加伊斯兰堡会谈的消息传出后，一位知情人士告诉塔斯尼姆通讯社驻巴基斯坦记者，此消息不实，未经证实。伊朗和美国代表团是伊斯兰堡仅有的在场国家。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱 Iran raises U.S. breaches with Pakistan’s PM Tasnim correspondent dispatched to Islamabad, Pakistan: — The Iranian delegation will raise the issue of breaches by the American side in today's noon meeting with Shehbaz Sharif, the Prime Minister of…" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iran’s talks team meeting with Pakistan’s PM Sharif right now. Before making decision on 'whether to negotiate or not' with US — Fars News.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸 伊朗向巴基斯坦总理提出美国违背承诺的问题。塔斯尼姆通讯社派驻巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡记者：——伊朗代表团将在今天中午与夏巴兹·谢里夫总理的会议上提出美方违背承诺的问题……” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗谈判代表团目前正在与巴基斯坦总理谢里夫会面。在决定“是否与美国谈判”之前——法尔斯通讯社。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸🇱🇧 An Iranian delegation headed by parliamentary speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf and Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi met Pakistan’s army chief Asim Munir in Islamabad, lodging a strong protest over the US breach of promise. Tehran had set conditions…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇱🇧 Iranian media said a “good cop, bad cop” scenario is playing out ahead of possible US‑Iran talks in Islamabad, with U.S. President Trump issuing threats while U.S. Vice President Vance is portrayed as a peacemaker. Iran maintains two preconditions for any talks: a ceasefire in Lebanon and the release of Iranian frozen assets – both allegedly agreed to by the US via Pakistani mediators but not yet implemented. The U.S. and Israel are reportedly trying to limit a Lebanon ceasefire to Beirut only, excluding southern Lebanon. Iran’s delegation met Pakistan’s army chief and is now meeting Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif. A decision on whether to hold talks with the US later today will be made after this meeting. A report that four guest countries would attend the talks has been denied. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸🇱🇧 由议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫和外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐率领的伊朗代表团在伊斯兰堡会见了巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔，就美国违背承诺提出了强烈抗议。德黑兰设定了条件……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇱🇧 伊朗媒体称，在伊斯兰堡可能举行的美伊会谈前，正在上演一场“好警察、坏警察”的戏码，美国总统特朗普发出威胁，而美国副总统万斯则被描绘成和平缔造者。伊朗为任何会谈设定了两个先决条件：黎巴嫩停火和解冻伊朗资产——据称美国已通过巴基斯坦调解人同意了这两点，但尚未实施。据报道，美国和以色列正试图将黎巴嫩停火限制在贝鲁特，排除黎巴嫩南部。伊朗代表团会见了巴基斯坦陆军参谋长，目前正在会见总理夏巴兹·谢里夫。是否在今天晚些时候与美国举行会谈的决定将在这次会议后做出。关于四个客座国家将参加会谈的报道已被否认。 @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor This basically means Vance will take the first proposal that gives Trump a political way out of the mess he created, regardless of what it costs the rest of us. The US and Iranian delegations were gathered for private meetings at a hotel in Islamabad. Iranian negotiator Mohammad Ghalibaf said he entered talks hopeful, with good intentions, but cautious, per Iranian state TV. @VP Vance told US reporters President Trump gave him "some pretty clear guidelines" and if the Iranians were willing to negotiate in good faith, the US would extend the open hand. - Jennifer Jacobs tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这基本上意味着万斯将接受第一个能给特朗普提供摆脱他所制造混乱的政治出路的提议，无论这对我们其他人来说代价是什么。美国和伊朗代表团聚集在伊斯兰堡的一家酒店进行私人会谈。伊朗谈判代表穆罕默德·卡利巴夫表示，他怀着希望和良好的意图进入会谈，但很谨慎，据伊朗国家电视台报道。万斯副总统告诉美国记者，特朗普总统给了他“一些非常明确的指导方针”，如果伊朗人愿意真诚地进行谈判，美国将伸出援手。 - 詹妮弗·雅各布斯（Jennifer Jacobs）推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇷🇺 Former Donbas separatist leader and veteran of the so-called “special military operation,” Pavel Gubarev, said in an interview with Yuri Dud that the war has lost its purpose and resembles a form of sacrifice. 🔻 He stated that Russia no longer clearly understands its goals or what would constitute victory, while Ukrainians have a clearer objective — to defeat what they see as an occupying force and liberate their country. 🔻 Gubarev also acknowledged that without support from the Russian army in 2014, separatist forces in Donbas would have been overrun. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇷🇺 前顿巴斯分裂主义领导人、“特别军事行动”老兵帕维尔·古巴列夫（Pavel Gubarev）在接受尤里·杜德（Yuri Dud）采访时表示，这场战争已经失去了目的，类似于一种牺牲。🔻 他指出，俄罗斯不再清楚地了解其目标或什么构成胜利，而乌克兰人有更明确的目标——击败他们眼中的占领军并解放他们的国家。🔻 古巴列夫还承认，如果没有2014年俄罗斯军队的支持，顿巴斯的分裂主义势力早就被击溃了。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: ⚡ 🇶🇦 🇮🇷 Qatar gas released for the first time footage of the wreckage of at least one Iranian Su-24. A pair of Su-24 was allegedly shot down by Qarari fighter jets as they were about to bomb the Al-Udeid airbase. The video shows parts of the fuselage, landing gear and tail section. The registration of the aircraft is unclear (starting with 3-68××). @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇶🇦 🇮🇷 卡塔尔天然气公司首次发布了至少一架伊朗苏-24残骸的画面。据称，一对苏-24在准备轰炸乌代德空军基地时被卡塔尔战斗机击落。视频显示了机身、起落架和尾部的部分。飞机的注册号不清楚（以3-68××开头）。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇵🇸 Israeli media: We are victims of political illusion, as there is no resolution in Gaza or Lebanon despite the war.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇵🇸 以色列媒体：我们是政治幻想的受害者，因为尽管发生了战争，加沙或黎巴嫩仍没有解决方案。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 The Iranian delegation has left their accommodation for the Pakistani Prime Minister’s office in Islamabad to meet Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif at 1pm local time. Any potential talks with the U.S. would take place this afternoon and are…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 An Iranian delegation headed by parliamentary speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf and Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi met Pakistan’s army chief Asim Munir in Islamabad, lodging a strong protest over the US breach of promise. Tehran had set conditions for talks – including the release of Iranian assets and a ceasefire in Lebanon – which the Pakistani mediator said the US had agreed to, but they remain unfulfilled. Iran has kept oil tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz unchanged in response. The delegation is scheduled to meet Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif at 1pm local time. Any potential US‑Iran talks would be held at the Serena Hotel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 伊朗代表团已离开住处前往巴基斯坦总理办公室，将于当地时间下午1点会见巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫。任何与美国的潜在会谈都将在今天下午举行，并且……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 由议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫和外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐率领的伊朗代表团在伊斯兰堡会见了巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔，就美国违背承诺提出了强烈抗议。德黑兰为会谈设定了条件——包括解冻伊朗资产和黎巴嫩停火——巴基斯坦调解人称美国已同意这些条件，但仍未实现。作为回应，伊朗保持了通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮交通不变。代表团定于当地时间下午1点会见总理夏巴兹·谢里夫。任何潜在的美伊会谈都将在塞雷纳酒店（Serena Hotel）举行。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Former U.S. Hostage in Iran: "All the Negotiation Framework Is in Iran's Hands" Barry Rosen, held hostage in Iran for 444 days during the 1979 embassy crisis, commented on the current Pakistan negotiations: "Everything about these negotiations is maddening. War will not defeat Iran — we just tried and it didn’t work. Iran absorbs, adapts, and waits. The most frustrating part is that we handed the framework to them. Tehran is leading the talks, still controls the Strait of Hormuz, and wants everything on the table: sanctions relief, enrichment rights, U.S. troop withdrawal, plus deals on Lebanon and Gaza. If Israel keeps bombing and Washington can’t stop it, none of this will hold."
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 前美国驻伊朗人质：“所有谈判框架都掌握在伊朗手中”。在1979年大使馆危机期间在伊朗被扣为人质444天的巴里·罗森（Barry Rosen）评论了当前的巴基斯坦谈判：“关于这些谈判的一切都令人抓狂。战争不会打败伊朗——我们刚刚尝试过，但没有奏效。伊朗吸收、适应并等待。最令人沮丧的部分是我们把框架交给了他们。德黑兰主导着会谈，仍然控制着霍尔木兹海峡，并希望把一切都摆在桌面上：制裁减免、浓缩权利、美国撤军，以及关于黎巴嫩和加沙的协议。如果以色列继续轰炸而华盛顿无法阻止，这一切都将无法维持。”

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 A group of journalists from various media around the world have gathered to cover topics related to the possible Iran-US negotiations in Islamabad, Pakistan.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 来自世界各地媒体的一群记者聚集在一起，报道与巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡可能举行的伊美谈判相关的话题。

text: Iran can’t reopen the Strait of Hormuz fully because it can’t find or remove all the sea mines it placed, according to U.S. officials. Source: NYT
text_zh: 据美国官员称，伊朗无法完全重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，因为它无法找到或清除其放置的所有水雷。来源：纽约时报

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Vance landed in Islamabad for Iran/US talks, welcomed by Pakistani officials. They seem friendly." 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Mohammad Ishaq Dar, Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister of Pakistan, welcomed Kushner the son in law of Trump and Witkoff the real estate agent.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇺🇸 🇵🇰 万斯抵达伊斯兰堡进行伊美会谈，受到巴基斯坦官员的欢迎。他们看起来很友好。” 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 巴基斯坦副总理兼外交部长穆罕默德·伊沙克·达尔（Mohammad Ishaq Dar）欢迎了特朗普的女婿库什纳和房地产经纪人威特科夫。

text: 🇦🇪 Emirates Global Aluminium has declared a force majeure clause in its contracts to delay product deliveries due to the shutdown of some of its facilities following attacks by Iran.
text_zh: 🇦🇪 阿联酋全球铝业公司（Emirates Global Aluminium）已宣布其合同中的不可抗力条款，以推迟产品交付，原因是其部分设施在伊朗袭击后关闭。

text: 🇸🇦 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 Russian Muslims Call on Saudi Arabia to Convene an Iran Peace Summit Russian Muslims have called on Saudi Arabia to convene a peace summit on Iran. Albir Krganov, head of the Spiritual Assembly of Muslims of Russia, made the appeal back in March, formally asking Riyadh to organize a council and discuss the future of peace at the level of heads of Muslim states. The initiative reflects a growing conviction within Russia's Muslim leadership that the path to de-escalation runs not through Western diplomatic channels but through the Islamic world's own institutional weight. The timing is significant. With the US-brokered ceasefire already fraying and the Strait of Hormuz still partially blockaded, traditional diplomacy has visibly stalled. Russian Muslims are now positioning the ummah — the global Muslim community — as a legitimate peace broker, one that carries moral authority Tehran might actually respect. Whether Riyadh acts on this appeal remains to be seen, but the very fact that Moscow's Muslim leaders are pushing this agenda signals a deliberate Russian strategy to expand its mediation role through religious soft power. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇸🇦 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 俄罗斯穆斯林呼吁沙特阿拉伯召开伊朗和平峰会。俄罗斯穆斯林呼吁沙特阿拉伯召开关于伊朗的和平峰会。俄罗斯穆斯林精神大会负责人阿尔比尔·克尔加诺夫（Albir Krganov）早在三月份就提出了这一呼吁，正式要求利雅得组织一个委员会，并在穆斯林国家元首层面讨论和平的未来。这一倡议反映了俄罗斯穆斯林领导层中日益增长的信念，即通往局势缓和的道路不是通过西方外交渠道，而是通过伊斯兰世界自身的制度权重。时机很重要。随着美国斡旋的停火协议已经破裂，霍尔木兹海峡仍处于部分封锁状态，传统外交已明显陷入僵局。俄罗斯穆斯林现在将乌玛（Ummah）——全球穆斯林社区——定位为合法的和平调解人，一个德黑兰可能真正尊重的具有道德权威的调解人。利雅得是否会根据这一呼吁采取行动还有待观察，但莫斯科的穆斯林领导人正在推动这一议程的事实本身，就标志着俄罗斯通过宗教软实力扩大其调解作用的蓄意战略。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
